entries.summary: Initial brain save. Phase 01 + 02 committed. Phase 03 code complete but uncommitted.
project_changes: Phase 01: NestJS project init, Prisma, Supabase config, env validation (commit 750efb7)
Phase 02: Database schema (11 tables), Supabase JWT auth, guards, decorators (commit b96af61)
Phase 03: Tenant + Agent CRUD modules with RBAC (uncommitted, 27 files changed/added)

commits.message: chore: init monorepo - AI Automation Suite
feat(be): Phase 02 - Database schema, Prisma, Auth module

working_tree.summary: Phase 03 fully implemented and reviewed. 14 new files (Tenant + Agent modules), 13 modified files (schema updates, guard refactor, auth fixes).

decisions: Use sellerId (not authId/sub) as the identity key for all service layer queries
AuthenticatedUser.sellerId is required (not optional) because Strategy always auto-creates Seller
Controllers use inline type { sellerId: string } instead of AuthenticatedUser interface (TS isolatedModules constraint)
TenantGuard attaches both tenant and membership to request for downstream use
AgentService has its own verifyTenantAccess (defense in depth, checks isActive)
next_steps: Start Phase 04: LLM Integration (OpenAI chat completion)
Clean up empty scaffolding dirs (src/tenant/, src/agent/)
Tenant.settings column exists in DB but needs DTO exposure in future phase
open_questions: Should settings DTO be added in Phase 10 (Self-serve API) or earlier?
HNSW index needs manual SQL migration (Prisma db push doesn't support it)
